prompt: ok 这个 auth module 我想重构一下，现在是个 2000 行的 god class，auth、session management、password reset、OAuth 全 mixed 在一起，完全没有 tests。我要 break it apart properly

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Output contains a structured intake brief with clearly labeled sections

assertions.name: classifies-as-refactoring
assertions.description: Correctly classifies work as 'Refactoring' (not enhancement or bug fix)

assertions.name: assesses-scope-accurately
assertions.description: Assesses scope as medium or large (2000-line god class is not small)

assertions.name: recommends-architecture-review
assertions.description: Recommends architecture/design review before diving into code (need to plan component boundaries)

assertions.name: flags-no-tests-risk
assertions.description: Identifies the absence of tests as a key risk for refactoring

assertions.name: suggests-test-first
assertions.description: Recommends writing characterization tests before refactoring (TDD or test-first approach)

assertions.name: asks-before-proceeding
assertions.description: Asks for user approval before starting implementation
